use_codes.desc: ATROVENT HFA (IPRATROPIUM BROMIDE HFA) INHALATION AEROSOL IS INDICATED AS A BRONCHODILATOR FOR MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF BRONCHOSPASM ASSOCIATED WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE, INCLUDING CHRONIC BRONCHITIS AND EMPHYSEMA.
